No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university-level program providing vocational skills for employment in the creative industry, directly supporting Targets 4.3 (tertiary education) and 4.4 (relevant skills for employment and entrepreneurship).
evidence: 為學生提供全面的動漫遊戲文創專案開發知識和技能
具備在該領域追求職業的能力
培養他們在這個充滿創意和競爭的行業中的競爭力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops skills for the creative industry, a high-value sector, promoting creativity, innovation, and job creation, aligning with Targets 8.2 (economic productivity, innovation) and 8.3 (productive activities, decent job creation, entrepreneurship).
evidence: 提煉出具有創新性和獨特性的文創概念
培養學生的商業頭腦和市場敏感性

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course focuses on innovation within the creative industry, including the use of AI drawing technology, which supports technological upgrading and innovation (Targets 9.2, 9.5, 9.b).
evidence: 提煉出具有創新性和獨特性的文創概念

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course involves developing cultural creative projects and studying the history of animation and comics, which can be seen as contributing to and safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 動漫遊戲文創專案開發
歐美及台灣動漫畫發展史

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course emphasizes professional ethics and respecting intellectual property rights, which are foundational to promoting the rule of law and developing just institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.5).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course strongly emphasizes teamwork, communication, and collaboration through project practice, which are essential skills for effective multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17).
evidence: 學習溝通協作和解決問題
著重培養學生的組織能力和團隊合作精神
